description: Pilotage charge entrainement + ACWR + polarisation (prevention TFL/dos).

panels.description: Bandes colorees du statut Garmin (Productive / Peaking / Maintaining / Recovery / Strained / Unproductive / Detraining / Overreaching). Le suffixe _N de l'enum Garmin (ex PRODUCTIVE_3) indique la duree dans le state - ici on regroupe par categorie principale.
panels.title: Training Status Timeline — 180d

panels.description: Phrase Garmin trainingBalanceFeedbackPhrase : BALANCED (ideal) / AEROBIC_LOW_FOCUS (focus base = OK pour plan polarise Seiler) / AEROBIC_LOW/HIGH_SHORTAGE / ANAEROBIC_SHORTAGE/FOCUS. Suffixes _N de Garmin elides via regex.
panels.title: Load Focus History — 180d

panels.description: Phrase Garmin brute (ex. PRODUCTIVE_1, MAINTAINING_2, RECOVERY_2). Le code numerique trainingStatus n'est pas utilise (mapping incertain selon firmware).
panels.title: Training Status

panels.description: Source de verite Garmin officielle (trainingBalanceFeedbackPhrase). Requires extended fetcher patch.
panels.title: Load Focus
Acute vs Chronic Load + Garmin Targets

panels.description: Bandes : bleu = shortage (sous target_min), vert = optimal range, rouge = overload (au-dessus target_max). Thresholds calibres sur target_min/max actuels Garmin (a recalibrer si Garmin ajuste).

targets.query: SELECT last("monthlyLoadAnaerobic") AS "Anaerobic", last("monthlyLoadAerobicHigh") AS "High Aerobic", last("monthlyLoadAerobicLow") AS "Low Aerobic" FROM "TrainingStatus" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Load Focus 28d — vs Optimal Range

panels.description: Repartition % du temps en zones HR par semaine (lundi-dimanche, fuseau Paris). Couleurs Garmin : Z1+Z2 bleu (cible >= 80%), Z3 vert (cible 10%), Z4+Z5 rouge (cible <= 10%). 12 semaines glissantes incluant la semaine en cours.

targets.query: SELECT sum("hrTimeInZone_1") + sum("hrTimeInZone_2") AS "Z1+Z2 (cible 80%)", sum("hrTimeInZone_3") AS "Z3 (cible 10%)", sum("hrTimeInZone_4") + sum("hrTimeInZone_5") AS "Z4+Z5 (cible 10%)" FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ GROUP BY time(7d, 4d) fill(null)

panels.title: Polarization 80/10/10 — Weekly (12 wk)

panels.description: Synthèse daily : TE aero/ana + acute/chronic load + endurance score.
panels.title: Training Intensity (Aerobic + Anaerobic + Load + Endurance)

targets.query: SELECT sum("distance") FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ GROUP BY time(7d, 4d) fill(0)
SELECT sum("elapsedDuration") FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ GROUP BY time(7d, 4d) fill(0)

panels.description:
Foster Monotony & Strain - Carl Foster (Univ. Wisconsin-La Crosse, 1998 ; Foster JC et al., J Strength Cond Res 2001). Indicateurs de variabilite et surcharge cumulee, valides comme marqueurs d'overtraining et d'illness chez les athletes endurance.

CE QUE CA MESURE
- Monotony = moyenne(charge_quotidienne_7j) / ecart-type(charge_quotidienne_7j). Capte l'uniformite de la semaine. Une semaine 100/100/100/100/100/100/100 (tres monotone) est physiologiquement pire qu'une semaine 200/50/150/0/200/100/100 (variee, meme charge totale). L'organisme a besoin d'alternance stress/repos pour declencher la supercompensation.
- Strain = charge_hebdo_totale x Monotony. Composite qui pondere charge ET uniformite.

CALCUL
Source : activityTrainingLoad Garmin sommee par jour, filtre running, jours OFF = 0. Fenetre glissante 7 jours.
Variance via identite Var(X) = E[X^2] - E[X]^2 (InfluxQL n'a pas moving_stddev natif).
Strain = (mean_7d * 7) * Monotony = sum_7j * Monotony.

LECTURE MONOTONY
< 1.5 : varie et sain (vert)
1.5 - 2.0 : zone de vigilance (jaune)
> 2.0 : risque accru illness/staleness (rouge, ref. Foster 1998)

LECTURE STRAIN
Pas de seuil absolu - c'est la derive qui compte. Spike >50% au-dessus du baseline moyen 4 sem = red flag.

PIEGES
- Une Monotony elevee pendant un taper voulu n'est pas pathologique (contexte > seuil).
- Filtre running uniquement (coherent avec dashboard 02). Muscu/velo non comptes.
- Jours OFF comptes comme 0 (voulu : le repos EST la variation).
- Different d'ACWR (orthogonal) : ACWR mesure la progression, Monotony mesure la variabilite.

ATTENTION BASE BUILDING
Base aerobie = risque reel de Monotony elevee (seances Z2 repetitives de duree similaire). Foster 1998 a documente les illness rates les plus hauts chez ce profil. Si Monotony derive >1.8 sans varier les durees, alterner LR / EZ court / off.

targets.query: SELECT moving_average(daily_tl, 7) / sqrt(moving_average(daily_tl_sq, 7) - moving_average(daily_tl, 7) * moving_average(daily_tl, 7)) AS "Monotony" FROM (SELECT sum("activityTrainingLoad") AS daily_tl, sum("activityTrainingLoad") * sum("activityTrainingLoad") AS daily_tl_sq FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ GROUP BY time(1d) fill(0))

SELECT (moving_average(daily_tl, 7) * 7) * (moving_average(daily_tl, 7) / sqrt(moving_average(daily_tl_sq, 7) - moving_average(daily_tl, 7) * moving_average(daily_tl, 7))) AS "Strain" FROM (SELECT sum("activityTrainingLoad") AS daily_tl, sum("activityTrainingLoad") * sum("activityTrainingLoad") AS daily_tl_sq FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ GROUP BY time(1d) fill(0))

panels.title: Foster Monotony & Strain (7d Rolling)

panels.description: Rolling mean approximation of TrainingPeaks EWMA. CTL = forme aerobie 6 sem. ATL = fatigue 7j. TSB = CTL - ATL : negatif = surcharge, positif = pic de forme. Sweet spot competition : TSB +5 a +15.

targets.query: SELECT moving_average(daily_tl, 42) AS "CTL (fitness 42j)", moving_average(daily_tl, 7) AS "ATL (fatigue 7j)" FROM (SELECT sum("activityTrainingLoad") AS daily_tl FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ GROUP BY time(1d) fill(0))

SELECT moving_average(daily_tl, 42) - moving_average(daily_tl, 7) AS "TSB (form)" FROM (SELECT sum("activityTrainingLoad") AS daily_tl FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE $timeFilter AND "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/ GROUP BY time(1d) fill(0))

panels.title: PMC — Fitness (CTL 42d) / Fatigue (ATL 7d) / Form (TSB)

panels.description: Replique du graphe HRV Status Garmin Connect. Bande grise = baseline personnel. Marqueurs colores par status : vert = Balanced, orange = Unbalanced, rouge = Low.

targets.query: SELECT mean("weeklyAvg") AS "Balanced" FROM "HRVStatus" WHERE "status" = 'BALANCED' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("weeklyAvg") AS "Unbalanced" FROM "HRVStatus" WHERE "status" = 'UNBALANCED' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("weeklyAvg") AS "Low" FROM "HRVStatus" WHERE "status" = 'LOW' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: HRV Status (7-day avg + baseline)

panels.description: Current heat acclimation trend from Garmin.
panels.title: Heat Trend

panels.description: Pourcentage d'acclimatation chaleur Garmin. Monte avec l'entrainement par temps chaud. >75% = bien acclimate. Pattern saisonnier attendu.
panels.title: Heat Acclimation (historique)

title: 02 Training Load & ACWR
